feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: is listening to too many albums in a single day a bad thing
entry.content: is listening to too many albums in a single day a bad thing
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >Frodo, the Dark Lord's eyes are upon Lothlórien. Do you think I look fat in thi…
entry.content: >Frodo, the Dark Lord's eyes are upon Lothlórien. Do you think I look fat in this dress? I don't want Hal-, I mean, Sauron to think that he dodged an arrowand forced me to downgrade. I mean, Celeborn is wise and all, but the guy can't read the fucking room for the life of him. You saw how he was going on and on about much desiring to speak with Gandalf when the dude was clearly dead and you mortal pussies were obviously crying over him? Everyone was so embarrassed they didn't even want to answer
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Half-Life 2: Episode One
entry.content: What are your thoughts on Half-Life 2: Episode One? I believe it is mildly underappreciated. Sure, it doesn't have as much to chew on as the base game or Episode Two, but the things it does add are great; additionally, the combat sections were memorable, especially the dark areas where having to conserve your suit energy meant life or death.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /int/ International: Is globalization making it so everyone in the world pays around the same for eve…
entry.content: Is globalization making it so everyone in the world pays around the same for everything? It used to be 20 years ago i could go to southern europe and everything would be 100% cheaper than here but the food prices in stores last time i was in milan were higher than in germany. Is this also the case for secondies like balkans and turkey aswell?
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /int/ International: hundreds of Germans go here to commit suicide every year
entry.content: i dont even know why but several thousands germans go to Sweden,Norway or Finland every year by car to get lost in the wilderness or simply to die. Local autorohies spend millions of dollars to find lost german tourists and mobilize thousands of helpers. I dont think that is okay. Germany should PAY UP. Or they should just ban germans from entering their countries in the first place.
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /mu/ Music: what exactly happened to post punk in the late 80's-90's? it's like is overlooke…
entry.content: what exactly happened to post punk in the late 80's-90's? it's like is overlooked until the early 00's post punk revival. thoughts? i can stillt hink about post punk oriented names during that era like the ex or dog faced hermans but still its like it was put in parenthesis? on the other hand you can see how post punk elements were included in indie (eg, pavement's slanted and enchanted)
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: the new "azstarys" has been a disaster
entry.content: today is day 4. my brain is fried, this stimulant saps resources and then leaves me as a wreck once it wears off. i went to bed at 7 PM yesterday. more importantly, it seems to have severely damaged nerves/telemetry readings responsible for my urinary tract. i can urinate, but the "urge sensor" is shot. a few drops of pee feels like an emergency. i have not soiled myself thankfully. about 30% of my cognitive capacity is constantly allocated to the urge to pee. this is not good. not good at all.
entry.dc:creator: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says

entry.content: >"Country Roads Take Me Home" Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/84154300/ >Scripts to check image
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Driving test
entry.content: Got my license years ago. Was watching those UK mock driving tests. I drive very little. Seeing all the things the candidates have to show and know worries me. I would fail a modern driving test.
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: You walk out of your apartment building and into the heavy rain. A homeless youn…
entry.content: You walk out of your apartment building and into the heavy rain. A homeless young man (pic related) is sitting on the sidewalk right outside, his back against the brick wall. You had been seeing him there a lot for the past month. He's barefoot and his clothes are soaked through. As you step past him, he looks up and asks you if you want to sign up for MAID with him. He tells you that they only accept applicants who are paired with a companion, and he says he somehow thinks that person has to be
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /int/ International: This is a closed source vidya game we're playing in a real world. Like all MMOs …
entry.content: This is a closed source vidya game we're playing in a real world. Like all MMOs it's plagued by gaytarded power mods who are enforcing a railroaded failRP plotline. This is why history is dumb and the entire world suffers from blatant admin favoritism. We're essentially playing on a shitty gmod darkRP server for no reason. Your entire nation's history is powerusers who probably ERP with the admins getting gameplay favors.

entry.title: /b/ Random: I dont like pets they're smelly
entry.content: I can get something low matinence like a fish. But cats and dogs are a lot of effort and hinder productivity. It's actually a bit of a deal breaker for me in relationships too. No I don't want these furry homunculus looking at us well we forneicate. No I don't want to bring Little Bartholomew for a walk 3 times a day. No I don't want my cat to claw at me and be judging my actions when im pacing, cleaning, or playing music in the house. The energy they bring isn't good for me, our ideals don't al
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.content: >Steam Machine waitlist is basically a lottery, even if you have the money to buy one, there's no guarantee you'll get one >Steam Deck prices shot through the roof, and even though I already have one, the sticks are starting to drift >every "Verified" game ends up being completely dogshit with missing FMVs or ugly stutterfests, even when they worked fine a month ago I mean it sucks to say but I'm becoming more of a Switch 2 gamer now because there was one too many releases recently that performe

entry.title: /g/ Technology: RETVRN TO MAINFRAMES
entry.content: I want to run a main (headless?) computer, containing all the games, logins, porn, and reaction images. And then just remote into it from around my house. So I can shitpost from the can, in bed, at the dinner table, in my room. How is this different than having a local server? Can you actually remote into a desktop from a phone?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: 4chan should be legally entitled to proceeds from this movie
entry.content: The Backrooms as a concept was invented by 4chan, Backrooms belongs to 4chan as much as lord of the rings belongs to Tolkien. Some Jews made a movie using 4chan’s idea and it made hundreds of millions of dollars. At the very least 4chan should be entitled to a royalties, but it will never happen because of reputation as a racist neonazi website
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Consciousness is fundamental and technology responds to consciousness. Instead o…
entry.content: Consciousness is fundamental and technology responds to consciousness. Instead of typing commands or tapping icons, software might respond to: intention, focused attention, emotional state, telepathic communication. Instead of separate apps like Photoshop, Word, Blender, Chrome, there might be one intelligent system that understands your goal. You could simply say, or think: "Design a spacecraft interior inspired by this crystal." Software might ask clarifying questions, suggest better solutions
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: anyone else in this situation (regarding hardware)?
entry.content: >sole computing devices are a cheap 8250U laptop and an xbox series s (latter cost me $250 + $20 for a devmode license for emulators) >even just three years ago, i was clowned on constantly for being a retard >now things are eerily quiet. there are no games worth playing, let alone ones that my xbox would "hold the generation back" over >oh also that xbox is $500 (msrp) now LOL >sony is up in flames, and steam isn't a concern since i only play old ass PC games >plus free updates until 2032 on wi
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Do you have to grow up with video games to be able to play them?
entry.content: >Try to get my mom into video games since it seemed like it'd be a good way to spend time together >Strategically pick out games I think would be appropriate for her skill level >Watching her play while trying to help her understand basic mechanics like how the right stick moves the camera is actual torture >Thirty minutes later and she still can't get past the tutorial with me guiding her and has to hand the controller to me so she can progress >She eventually just gets frustrated and gives up
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /int/ International: Has a girl ever shown interested in you?
entry.content: Flag Only one girl and it was back in first grade more than 20 years ago. There was this girl who was absolutely obsessed with me. She would follow me everywhere I go. Wouldn't live my side even for one second. I didn't mind but other kids would make jokes about how I was a girl for hanging around with her all day. It doesn't make sense now but before going through puberty hanging around with girls sounded very gay to me. That made me start to hate her more and more. Suddenly she stopped coming
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Herbie Mann: Discothèque [Atlantic, 1975] "You know what this is?" my wife asked…
entry.content: Herbie Mann: Discothèque [Atlantic, 1975] "You know what this is?" my wife asked when this came on. "This is easy-listening versions of 'Pick Up The Pieces' and 'Lady Marmalade.'" The disco people seem to like it, but what do they know? If the Red Chinese hordes somehow ever got control of this country, Herbie would have an album titled Quotations From Chairman Mao on the shelves in a week, and it would sell. D+
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /int/ International: Mighty Morphin' Polish Republic
entry.content: Remember: Most of Poland isn't even Polish. The land they were gifted by Russia was far more developed and industrialised than the land they lost in the east, as well as being far better positioned for continued growth. It was also completely ethnically cleansed. 8 million Germans fled from Poland's "new territories" in 1944-45, and the remaining 5 million Germans were forcibly expelled in 1946. This allowed ample space to settle Poles who lost land in the East. Pre-war Poland had around a full
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International
